ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., router, switch, server) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Last time the device was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, offline, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the metric was collected from */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., latency, packet loss) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time the metric was collected */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Alert status (e.g., triggered, not triggered) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., ms, %) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_utilization" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource utilization record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the resource utilization was collected from */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., CPU, memory, disk) */,
  "utilization" REAL /* Percentage of resource utilization */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time the resource utilization was collected */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the resource utilization */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Alert status (e.g., triggered, not triggered) */,
  "total_capacity" REAL /* Total capacity of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_utilization_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network traffic record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the network traffic was collected from */,
  "bytes_in" INTEGER /* Bytes in */,
  "bytes_out" INTEGER /* Bytes out */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time the network traffic was collected */,
  "threshold_bandwidth" INTEGER /* Threshold bandwidth for the device */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Alert status (e.g., triggered, not triggered) */,
  "interface" TEXT /* Specific network interface the traffic is from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_traffic_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the event occurred on */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., device failure, configuration change) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the event (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Resolution status of the event (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "assigned_to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to handle the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_assigned_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the alert was triggered by */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, acknowledged, resolved) */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was resolved */,
  "acknowledged_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who acknowledged the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_acknowledged_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("acknowledged_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network administrator, security analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for quick communication */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts for security purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the system was accessed */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "login_status" TEXT /* Status of the login attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "audit_time" TEXT /* Time the change was made */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "affected_device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device affected by the audit event */,
  "affected_table" TEXT /* Table in the database that was affected by the audit event */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_affected_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("affected_device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)
